title: Abu Dhabi、Abu Dhabi — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Abu Dhabi、Abu Dhabi的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Abu Dhabi是Abu Dhabi的一個城市，人口約1,567,000。The UAE’s capital and political center, offering a more relaxed pace than Dubai with lush waterfronts and cultural landmarks.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
